title: Repurposed Structures - PneumaticCraft: Repressurized Compat
description: Add PneumaticCraft houses to RS Villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and PneumaticCraft. You will find the new houses with their workstations in all RS's Villages. Have fun! (In 1.21+, this is now a mod!)

- PneumaticCraft can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized)

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VpyBGfGz/images/373e5b8017007fb89fa9960509f393d7789766c5.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VpyBGfGz/images/373e5b8017007fb89fa9960509f393d7789766c5.png)

**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
